ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cyclone_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "cyclone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cyclone being observed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the observation */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed at the time of the observation */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Central pressure at the time of the observation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cyclone (e.g., TROPICAL STORM, HURRICANE) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the observation */,
  "observation_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the observation */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclone_observations_cyclone_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclone_id") REFERENCES cyclones ("cyclone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclone_observations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES observation_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclones" (
  "cyclone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cyclone */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cyclone */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the cyclone */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the cyclone */,
  "max_wind_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed recorded during the cyclone */,
  "min_pressure" REAL /* Minimum central pressure recorded during the cyclone */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cyclone (e.g., Category 1, Category 2) */,
  "basin" TEXT /* Basin where the cyclone occurred (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the cyclone (e.g., tropical depression, extratropical) */,
  "last_known_position" TEXT /* Last known position of the cyclone */,
  "last_known_status" TEXT /* Last known status of the cyclone */,
  "external_data_source" TEXT /* Link to external data sources for more detailed information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cyclone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, ground-based) */,
  "source_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data provided by the source for a specific observation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_source_mapping_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES cyclone_observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES observation_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclone_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "cyclone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cyclone being predicted */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the prediction */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Predicted latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Predicted longitude */,
  "predicted_wind_speed" INTEGER /* Predicted wind speed */,
  "predicted_pressure" REAL /* Predicted central pressure */,
  "predicted_status" TEXT /* Predicted status of the cyclone */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclone_predictions_cyclone_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclone_id") REFERENCES cyclones ("cyclone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyclone_status_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "cyclone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cyclone */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the cyclone */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the cyclone */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., intensification, weakening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclone_status_changes_cyclone_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclone_id") REFERENCES cyclones ("cyclone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for additional contact information */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for meteorologist, 3 for researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "cyclone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cyclone being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cyclone_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclone_id") REFERENCES cyclones ("cyclone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cyclone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cyclone triggering the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., intensity change, path deviation) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_cyclone_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclone_id") REFERENCES cyclones ("cyclone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
